title: Designing a 3D Molecule Model
scenario: Create a 3D molecule model of a complex organic molecule with the chemical formula C20H12O6. The model should have a minimum of 50 atoms and include specific functional groups (hydroxyl, carbonyl, and amino). The model should be colored to distinguish between different types of atoms. Use a widely used molecule visualization software's API syntax to define the model's structure.
constraints: Must use the Avogadro API syntax
Must include a minimum of 50 atoms

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated code is syntactically valid for the Avogadro API.
Verify that the generated molecule model includes all specified functional groups and has the correct chemical formula.
Assess the readability and maintainability of the generated code.
